_schema.description: Scripts domain kalıcı hata DB. SCRIPTS_AGENTS.md §9: bir hatayı asla tekrarlama; tekrar = recurrence_count++ + prevention_rule güçlendir.

fields.category: shell | hmac | ios | bench | registration | portability
fields.prevention_rule: gelecekte aynı sınıfı engelleyen tek cümle

known_risks_preloaded.note: iOS ±5dk clock skew imzayı kırar. Prevention: NTP-aware timestamp; bench öncesi server saat farkını ölç.
Register-seam dışında server iş-mantığına dokunmak §3 ihlali. Prevention: server edit'i yalnız ToolRegistry.register() satırı; derini escalate.
BSD vs GNU divergence (sed -i, date, readlink, grep -P). Prevention: macOS'ta BSD varyantı test et; shellcheck hepsini yakalamaz.
iOS sandbox keyfi shell çalıştıramaz. Prevention: iOS = consumer-only tier; asla host-exec target tasarlama.
Komşu CLI sekmesi aynı repo'da. Prevention: her commit öncesi git status; cli/ değişikliği görürsen dur, senin işin değil.

macOS Local Network Privacy 'responsible process'i GUI ata üzerinden izler; host-bridge bir LaunchAgent (PPID=1, GUI atası yok) → outbound LAN sessizce bloklanır (openclaw#24018). Bench iOS yolu cihazdan Mac'e LAN üstünden vurur; bağlantı sessiz fail edebilir. Prevention: bench iOS hedefini açık LAN-IP ile test et + Privacy izni ver; egress'i 127.0.0.1'e zorlama, tunnel/reverse-proxy alternatifi belge. Kaynak: github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/24018.

Ollama prompt fully-cached olduğunda prompt_eval_* alanlarını ATLAR; ham bölme NaN/Infinity üretir. Prevention: tokensPerSecond() eksik/0 süreyi null'a indirger (div-by-zero guard), asla throw etmez. Kaynak deseni: MinhNgyuen/llm-benchmark (MIT).

errors.root_cause: Scripts tab shared the single working tree ~/Desktop/ollamas with several other active tabs. A concurrent tab ran git checkout (scripts-v1 -> main -> v1.4 -> frontend-vf1), yanking the branch underneath this tab: v1 governance files vanished from view and finished+green v2 edits ended up on the FRONTEND branch, not feat/scripts-v1. Committing there would have contaminated another tab's branch (RISK-SCR-005 realized).
errors.evidence: git reflog: 'checkout: moving from feat/scripts-v1 to main' then ...to v1.4 to frontend-vf1; git branch --show-current => feat/frontend-vf1; v1 commit dbb8f9c safe but unreachable from HEAD.
errors.fix: Recovered via isolated worktree: git worktree add ~/Desktop/ollamas-scripts-wt feat/scripts-v1; copied v2 files in; committed there. Shared tree left untouched.
errors.prevention_rule: Scripts tab MUST work only in its own git worktree (~/Desktop/ollamas-scripts-wt), never the shared ~/Desktop/ollamas tree. At every session start verify the worktree branch == feat/scripts-* before any work or commit.

errors.root_cause: In the shared tree the frontend lane's untracked projects-based vitest.config.ts restricted the node project include to tests/**, so scripts/tests/ was collected by NOTHING (false-green risk). Plan wrongly assumed the default recursive glob applied.
errors.evidence: npx vitest run scripts/tests/... -> 'No test files found'; include: tests/**/*.test.ts.
errors.fix: In the isolated worktree there is no vitest.config.ts, so vitest's default glob collects scripts/tests/ automatically — no config needed (shared-tree-only artifact).
errors.prevention_rule: After adding tests, always confirm they are actually collected (test-file count increased). A projects-based vitest.config.ts overrides the default glob; isolation avoids cross-lane config contamination.
errors.test_added: scripts/tests/*.test.ts (4 files collected by default glob)

errors.root_cause: Line 9 hardcodes REPO to an absolute home path; breaks on any other machine/user/checkout. Found while surveying golden-test candidates.
errors.evidence: bridge-client.mjs:9 export const REPO = absolute home path literal;
errors.fix: DEFERRED to v6 (Hardening & Portability); recorded so it is not lost.
errors.prevention_rule: No hardcoded absolute paths in scripts. Derive repo root from import.meta.url / env, never a literal home path.

errors.root_cause: İlk v5 tasarımı host tool'larını `host_` prefix'le DYNAMIC'e ekledi + flat schema {name,description,parameters} kullandı. İki kırılma: (1) host_ dupe'ları ToolRegistry.list()/schemas() üzerinden MCP expose'a sızdı → mcp-gateway.e2e 'free-plan 15 safe-tier tools' sayısı bozuldu; (2) expose `t.schema.function.description` okuyor — ToolSchema OpenAI function şekli ({type:'function',function:{...}}), flat değil → 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading description)'.
errors.evidence: vitest: tests/mcp-gateway.e2e.test.ts 3 failed (108→105); McpError -32603 reading 'description'; server/mcp/server.ts:46 t.schema.function.description
errors.fix: Tasarım reconciler'a çevrildi: register-if-absent / skip-if-present (registry.has) → boot'ta statik 15 tool skip, expose/ReAct kirlenmez. Schema OpenAI function şekline (fn() ayna) çevrildi. Tüm suite tekrar yeşil (108/1).
errors.prevention_rule: Scripts ToolRegistry'ye kayıt yaparken: (a) DAİMA canonical isim + has()-reconciler kullan, choke-point expose yüzeyini dupe'la kirletme; (b) schema DAİMA OpenAI function şekli `{type:'function',function:{name,description,parameters}}` — server/tool-registry.ts fn() ayna; flat schema YASAK. Yeni kayıt eklemeden önce mcp-gateway.e2e koş.
errors.test_added: scripts/tests/register-hooks.test.ts (12 case: reconciler skip/idempotent, OpenAI function shape, zod reject)
